Why Choose CEB

The Moonwalk Difference

We are not just a rental company — we are your party mission control. Here is what sets us apart:

🛡️

Insured & Inspected

All units are fully insured, sanitized before every rental, and meet Texas safety standards.

🚚

Free Delivery & Setup

We deliver, set up, and pick up — so you can focus on enjoying the party, not doing the work.

⚡

Fast & Reliable

On-time every time. Same-day rentals available when you need something last minute.

💜

Family Owned

We are a local Houston family business that truly cares about making your event unforgettable.

🚀
The Process

Book in 3 Easy Steps

01
📞
Call or Text Us

Reach out by phone, text, or Facebook. Tell us your date, location, and how many kids are coming.

02
📋
Pick Your Rental

Choose from our lineup of water slides, combo units, and bounce houses. We will help you find the perfect fit.

03
🎉
We Deliver the Fun

We show up on time, set everything up, and come back to break it down. You just enjoy the party!

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What areas do you serve?▼

We serve Houston and surrounding areas including Katy, Cypress, Sugar Land, Pearland, Baytown, and more. Contact us if you are unsure about your location!

How far in advance should I book?▼

We recommend booking at least 1-2 weeks in advance, especially for weekends. However, we do accept same-day bookings when availability allows!

Is delivery and setup included?▼

Yes! Delivery, setup, and pickup are included in all rentals. We handle everything so you can relax and enjoy your event.

Are your units clean and safe?▼

Absolutely. All our inflatables are thoroughly cleaned and sanitized between every rental, and fully insured for your peace of mind.

What if it rains on my event day?▼

Safety first! We will work with you to reschedule if there is severe weather. Contact us as soon as possible and we will find a solution together.
